candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Not current assets; wrong section.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Possible cash measure, but less standard than the explicit cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash by the end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance sheet cash is preferred for CHE.
Beginning cash from cash flow statement, not the balance-sheet cash stock target.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: This is the reported total current liabilities line on the balance sheet, matching LCT best.
Only a component/subtotal of current liabilities, not total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported current liabilities total.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist because it is the clear reported total current liabilities/current short-term liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match for short-term debt on the balance sheet; preferred for STD.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Also matches STD semantics and explicitly excludes leases, but appears as a separate current-maturities component and should not be combined with a total short-term debt line unless necessary.
Cash flow label is not preferred when balance-sheet debt line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) increase (decrease) in current borrowings
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not the balance-sheet stock of short-term debt.

variables.notes: Selected the clean balance-sheet short-term debt total and excluded lease-related rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
PPE-related line, but likely only one component rather than total PPE given separate machinery and construction lines.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Net PPE wording fits target, but the balancing-value line appears unreliable/near-zero.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset; not baseline PPE target preference.
Major PPE component and likely part of gross PPE.
PPE component that should be included in total PPE if no clean total exists.
Would be best semantically as total net PPE, but appears to be a balancing line with near-zero values.

variables.notes: No clean reported total/net PPE line is available; balancing-value rows look unusable. Selected the likely non-lease PPE components as a provisional sum, but classification/double-counting risk remains.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Direct operating cash flow line; best match for net cash flow from operating activities.
Only a component within operating cash flow, not total OANCF.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow label on cash flow statement.
